title: Cyber Fair
desc: Transport yourself to the future with Cyber Fair! The June round is here and loaded with all the cyber-tech gadgets, clothes, and a lot more for your cyberpunk addiction. If you're a fan of cyberpunk, cyber, sci-fi, cyber-tech, robotics, or cybernetics, you'll love this fair! The event runs from June 2nd to 22nd. Learn more at www.access-sl.com/cyberfair

title: Pride At Home
desc: Celebrate diversity at Pride at Home! Since 2020, Pride at Home has been bringing the community together to celebrate love, inclusivity, and connection in Second Life. Explore the destination, discover free gifts at the Expo, and enjoy an exciting lineup of parties and live entertainment. Keep an eye on their event calendar and learn more at prideathome.online

title: The Arcade
desc: The Arcade is Second Life’s premier destination for gacha with collectible prizes, surprise pulls, and must-have collections from top creators! The wonders of The Arcade await you! The event runs from June 1st through June 30th. Learn more at thearcadesl.com

title: Blue Finch
desc: Welcome to Blue Finch, a charming coastal town with stunning waterfront views and relaxing activities. Tour the region aboard the Cuddly Owl Bear, explore by bicycle, enjoy a boat ride, play mini golf, visit cozy cafés, swim, relax on a floating raft, or unwind on the beach. Whether seeking adventure, friendship, or quiet moments, Blue Finch offers a perfect escape filled with beauty, comfort, and discovery.

title: Salvage Station
desc: Salvage Station returns June 1–30, bringing a post-apocalyptic shopping experience filled with varied tech junkpunk, salvagepunk, scavenge punk, scrappunk, including a custom build from Dirty Rat. Learn more at secondlifesyndicate.com/salvage-station

title: Hair Fair 2026
desc: Hair Fair 2026 is the 20th Anniversary of this event. 6 regions of exclusive and previous hair and hair-related releases, all donating a percentage to Wigs for Kids. The event runs from May 30th to June 14th, 2026. Join the Hair Fair DEMO Group to try before you buy! More info at hairfair.wordpress.com

title: Everbloom
desc: Everbloom is a romantic destination. A place to breathe. Let your soul unwind as the evening sun bathes the terrace in warm golden light. Surrounded by blooming gardens, gentle sounds of nature, and peaceful animals, you'll find the kind of tranquility that is so often lost in everyday life. Sometimes happiness needs nothing more than a croissant, a quiet moment, and the perfect view.

title: Moonlit Holdings Grovestead
desc: Moonlit Holdings Grovestead is home to Lunar Grove’s Olive Tree Community, offering a peaceful collection of rental homes nestled within a lush garden landscape designed to inspire comfort, connection, and belonging. Rooted in the enduring story of the Olive Tree, this community embraces harmony, care, and shared purpose. Rental homes are available from L$375 to L$475 per week.

title: Waterfalls of Dreams
desc: Candlelit dinners, relaxation, tai chi, and dancing await at Waterfalls of Dreams. Explore the waterfalls by rowing boat, hot air balloon, flying machine, or horseback. Many romantic spots invite couples to unwind, while weddings can be arranged. Elves, fairies, and other magical creatures are warmly welcomed.

title: The Soul in Image
desc: The Soul in Image showcases unique photographs and images that tell far more than a story. Between emotions, creativity, and captivating gazes, visitors are invited to see the world differently. The Soul in Image présente des photographies et des images uniques qui racontent bien plus qu'une histoire. Entre émotions, créativité et regards captivants, les visiteurs sont invités à voir le monde autrement.

title: Black Light at Shattered Isles
desc: Black Light is a three-floor entertainment and gaming destination located at Shattered Isles. It is family-friendly with all moderate games marked with a warning.

title: Land of Misfits & Lost Souls
desc: The Land of Misfits & Lost Souls at Shattered Isles is a hidden coastal town where beauty and danger exist side by side. Explore beaches, a funfair, drive-in theater, schools, family homes, local shops, and community spaces while uncovering the island's supernatural mysteries. This roleplay-friendly destination welcomes families, magical beings, and storytellers looking to create new adventures.

title: BADU - BRAZIL
desc: Welcome to Rio de Janeiro, the vibrant heart of Brazil, where every street pulses with rhythm, color, and unforgettable energy. Feel the vibrant Carioca spirit in every corner as you explore iconic landmarks like Christ the Redeemer and Copacabana Beach, Escadaria Selaron, Sugarloaf Mountain, and Lapa Arches.

title: MOKAMBO - ZANZIBAR
desc: Known as the Pearl of Africa, Asharhia unveils this beautiful African paradise. Surrounded by pristine Pacific Ocean beaches and crystal-clear turquoise waters, this captivating destination promises breathtaking views, unforgettable experiences, and picture-perfect moments at every turn.

title: The Sapphic Fur Nook
desc: The Sapphic Fur Nook is a warm and cozy retreat for sapphic furries seeking a relaxed place to connect. Created for women who love women, it offers a welcoming space to chat, cuddle, play games, dance, or unwind by the fire in a romantic winter setting. Focused on comfort, community, and shared experiences, the Nook provides a furry-friendly atmosphere where visitors can relax at their own pace.

title: DragonMyst
desc: DragonMyst is the home of Elf Clan and Fairelands Thunder. It is a fantasy destination with perches for dragons and activities for elves, fae, pixies, dwarves, dwagons, and more. Enjoy ground-based activities, three horse trail rides, high-sky arena challenges, multiple race tracks, or simply relax and chat with dragons.

title: GUY Magazine PRIDE in Space 2026
desc: GUY Magazine PRIDE in Space 2026 is this year’s installment of GUY Magazine’s annual Pride festival, hosted at The Portal. It features shopping, games, carnival rides, live acts, and parties throughout June, with an opening celebration on May 31 and events like live dance shows and a K-pop concert.

title: Tatiana Garden Club
desc: Tatiana Club is home to great classic rock and live music shows! It is a great place to hang out and is open to DJs or artists desiring a place for events.

title: Vic's Chophouse & Lounge
desc: Experience luxury dining at Vic's Chophouse & Lounge. Offering immersive roleplay dining, chef tasting experiences, self-service options, live entertainment, special events, cooking classes, catering services, and upscale hospitality in a sophisticated Miami-inspired atmosphere.

title: City Of Creswell
desc: A bustling modern city filled with opportunity. Creswell blends the grittier city with slice-of-life roleplay to create a living breathing world for every kind of character. From nightlife and crime to emergency services, businesses, or day-to-day life, the city is built to support all styles of urban roleplay.

title: London Town Pride Event 2026
desc: London Town celebrates Pride Month with live music, DJs, shopping, and community events from June 1st-30th. Explore a bustling town setting filled with vendor booths, LGBTQ+ history displays, entertainment, and social spaces while enjoying a welcoming atmosphere.

title: VWEC Community Faire Summer 2026
desc: Come see amazing educational communities in the metaverse sharing a diverse variety of subjects and immersive experiences. Network with professors, artists, scientists, historians, musicians, people from all different fields at the faire, along with rides, games, and….you guessed it, LEMONADE and summer-time snacks! All are welcome at the Virtual Worlds Education Consortium Community Faire. The event runs from May 30th through August 15th, 2026. Learn more at vweconsortium.org

title: Dystopian Night
desc: Come and soak up the atmosphere of this near-future dystopian and cyberpunk sprawl. Take photos, hang with friends, explore, roleplay, or just chill out in this cityscape.

title: Digital Citizenship Outpost
desc: Digital Citizenship Outpost is an immersive space exploring the metamodern era through the lens of the four seasons, each representing a key theme: metamodernism, metaliteracy, digital citizenship, and artificial intelligence. Oscillation is a key theme in metamodern culture, where we learn to balance between a tension of opposites, including our physical and digital lives.

title: THE STORE DANLAE
desc: Welcome to the DANLAE store, where you will find many things, including men's and women's clothing, homes, skyboxes, furniture, and more! Bienvenue dans la boutique DANLAE où vous trouverez différentes choses, vêtements homme et femme, maison, skybox, meubles, et bien d'autres.

title: Sci-Fi Con 18
desc: The 18th annual Sci-Fi Convention aims to make a significant impact on the lives of those affected by Parkinson's disease, with proceeds benefiting the Michael J. Fox Foundation. Attendees can explore 9 Sci-Fi themed regions over the decades. Each offering unique adventures and surprises. The event runs from May 29th to June 9th, 2026. Find out more at scificon.org.es

title: Second Life Cinema
desc: Experience the magic of machinima at the Second Life Cinema! With regular events and an ever-changing roster of videos, it's a must-visit for film enthusiasts in Second Life. Remember to enable your media, turn up the volume under Sound & Media Preferences, and toggle the play/pause button to watch the movies here. Currently playing SL Video Creators Group's Hot Off the Render for June 2026.
